svg.title: Ancient CT-side five-player default over the sourced callout map
svg.desc: Five defenders hold A Main, Mid, Donut, B Ramp, and Catwalk angles. Blue dashed rays show the first lane to hold and the safe rotation trigger.
svg.text: Hold your lane; rotate after confirmed information.
Rotation trigger: confirmed site contact, utility clearing a lane, or a teammate's reliable call.
